In the above Zodiacal chart, also called the universal Rasi
chart, Sun occupying the Leo sign represents the Father and Moon
occupying the Cancer sign represents the mother. In the anti-
clockwise direction the mother gives the child (Mercury-anti-
clockwise direction the mother gives the child (Mercury-Gemini)
all comfort (Venus-Taums), power (Mars-Aries), knowledge
(Jupiter-Pisces), so that he is made fit for career or profession
(Saturn-Aquarius).
Similarly father-the Sun posited in Leo does it in clockwise
direction. For the child (Mercury in Virgo), the father gives all
comforts (Venus in Libra)., energy and power (Mars in Scorpio),
knowledge and wisdom (Jupiter in Sagittarius), so that the child is
prepared for Karma. (Saturn in Capricorn.)
The other delienation of the universal Rasi chart is that Sun
in Leo is the king and Moon in Cancer is the Queen. Mars in
Aries and Scorpio gives energy to the king and queen. Venus in
